=== 200605 ===
### 200605 | res=2026-03-24 | string (country)
Q: Which country's citizens will Australia say are covered by its temporary six-month visitor ban, in a Home Affairs announcement by March 31, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-09. Australia is reviewing border and visa settings as war in the Middle East disrupts travel and creates uncertainty about whether some short-term visitors will be able to leave on time. The federal government can temporarily change entry rules for overseas nationals.
RC: Source of Truth : Official statements or releases from Australia's Department of Home Affairs, with major news reporting such as Reuters, AP, ABC, or Al Jazeera used only to confirm the wording if needed. Resolution Date : This question resolves on the first date, no later than March 31, 2026, when the Department of Home Affairs publicly identifies the nationality covered by the temporary visitor restriction. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the country name only, in English, exactly matching the nationality targeted by the restriction. Do not include extra words such as "citizens" or "passport holders".
  PRED: {'Iran': 0.33, 'Israel': 0.13, 'Lebanon': 0.1, 'Iraq': 0.06}
=== 240291 ===
### 240291 | res=2026-03-24 | string (country)
Q: What country will Latvian officials say a drone that crashes after entering from Russian airspace may be linked to by March 31, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-15. Latvia is watching its airspace closely during the ongoing conflict in a neighboring country. If an unmanned aircraft enters Latvia from abroad and crashes, officials may comment on which country it appears to be connected with.
RC: Source of Truth : This question will resolve based on official statements from Latvia’s prime minister, defence ministry, air force, or another Latvian government authority, with major international news-wire reporting used as confirmation if necessary. Resolution Date : The question resolves when Latvian officials publicly identify the country they say the drone may be linked to, no later than March 31, 2026. Accepted Answer Format : The answer must be the English name of the country only.
  PRED: {'Russia': 0.42, 'Belarus': 0.18, 'Ukraine': 0.06}
